ground_truth.title: Best Multivitamins (2025): Tested and Approved by Experts | Fortune
ground_truth.author: Christina Snyder
ground_truth.main_content: Our team of medical experts has independently evaluated and approved all the multivitamins in this guide. We found the best multivitamins for people of all ages and needs, thoroughly testing each product for quality and efficacy. After reviewing over 30 different multivitamins, our team narrowed down the top choices based on third-party testing, ingredient quality, and value. The experts assessed each product for nutrient forms, dosages, and bioavailability to ensure maximum effectiveness. We considered factors like third-party certifications from NSF, USP, and ConsumerLab for purity and potency. Each multivitamin was evaluated on its ability to deliver essential nutrients in forms the body can easily absorb. We also examined each brand's manufacturing practices and transparency in disclosing ingredients and sourcing.
